Home.HeroSection.Subtitle: Curated journeys through Morocco, Jordan, and Oman — where desert silence, old cities, and quiet beauty unfold at their own pace.

Home.AboutPreviewSection.Title: How We Travel
Home.AboutPreviewSection.Point3: We leave space for silence, architecture, and surprise.
Home.AboutPreviewSection.Point4: Journeys shaped around feeling, not checklists.
Home.FeaturedJourneysSection.Title: Selected Journeys
Home.FeaturedJourneysSection.Subtitle: A few moments worth crossing a desert for.
Home.FeaturedJourneysSection.Card1.Title: Night Beneath the Sahara
Home.FeaturedJourneysSection.Card2.Title: Petra Before the Crowds
Home.FeaturedJourneysSection.Card3.Title: Between Sea and Wadi
Home.QuotesSection.Quote1: The desert does not ask to be conquered, only understood.
Home.QuotesSection.Quote2: The best journeys leave you quieter than they found you.
Home.CTASection.Title: Stay close to the next journey.
Home.CTASection.Subtitle: Rare routes, quiet places, and new journeys — shared from time to time.
About.HeroSection.Title: How We Travel
About.HeroSection.Subtitle: We create journeys for people who want to move more slowly, feel more deeply, and return with something real.
About.OurPaceSection.Title1: We leave space in the route
About.OurPaceSection.Description1: Not every hour is planned. Space to wander. To rest. To let the day unfold.
About.OurPaceSection.Description2: Depth over breadth. We'd rather spend four nights in one riad than one night in four hotels.
About.OurPaceSection.Title3: We travel slower, we never rush
About.OurPaceSection.Description3: Three places over ten days, not ten places over three days. Time to feel the rhythm of a place, not just see it.
About.OurPaceSection.Title4: We stay in places that feel like homes
About.OurPaceSection.Description4: Small riads. Family-run lodges. Camps where you can hear the silence. Never chain hotels.
About.PropositionSection: We design journeys for people who want to travel less like tourists and more like temporary residents. Who value stillness as much as movement. Who understand that the best travel stories aren't about how much you saw, but how deeply you felt.
About.CTASection.Title: If this is your way of travel, we should talk.
About.CTASection.Subtitle: We’ll shape something personal, thoughtful, and quietly unforgettable.
Morocco.HeroSection.Title: Morocco
Morocco.AboutSection.Title: A Country of Contrast and Depth
Morocco.AboutSection.Description: Morocco moves between intimacy and scale — tiled riads and open dunes, mountain roads and ancient medinas, still courtyards and vivid streets. It is layered, textured, and endlessly atmospheric.
Morocco.AboutSection.Quote: “In Morocco, every doorway feels like the entrance to another world.”
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Title: Selected Experiences
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card1.Title: Night Beneath the Sahara sky
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card1.Descrip: A desert night you will not want to end.
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card2.Title: Atlas Valleys
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card2.Descrip: Picturesque villages where time flows slowly.
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card3.Title: Morning in Fes
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card3.Descrip: Quiet streets before the city begins to stir.
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card4.Title: Courtyard Morning
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card4.Descrip: Hidden calm behind carved walls and shade.
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card6.Title: Desert Fire Dinner
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card6.Descrip: An evening shaped by warmth and open space.
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card7.Title: Essaouira Lagoon
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card8.Title: Chefchaouen
Morocco.ExperiencesSection.Card9.Title: Sunset in Casablanca
Morocco.TravelNotesSection.Title: The Rhythm of Morocco
Morocco.TravelNotesSection.Point1: Mornings begin in shade, stone, and silence.
Morocco.TravelNotesSection.Point2: The road shifts from intimacy to vastness.
Morocco.TravelNotesSection.Point3: Desert space brings clarity to everything around it.
Morocco.TravelNotesSection.Point4: Beauty lives equally in silence and detail.
Morocco.CTASection.Title: Land of Contrasts. Every Turn a New World.
Jordan.HeroSection.Title: Jordan
Jordan.AboutSection.Title: A Journey Through Stillness and Time
Jordan.AboutSection.Description: Jordan feels ancient in the best way — carved into rock, stretched across desert, softened by early light, and filled with the kind of silence that stays with you.
Jordan.AboutSection.Quote: Jordan does not ask for attention. It earns it.
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Title: Selected Experiences
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card1.Title: Petra at First Light
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card1.Descript: Stone, shadow, and the early hour.
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card2.Title: Wadi Rum Under Stars
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card2.Descript: Vast stillness in the heart of the desert.
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card3.Title: Dawn Through the Canyon
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card4.Title: Dead Sea Stillness
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card4.Descript: Salt air, warm water, and complete calm.
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card5.Title: Ancient Paths
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card6.Title: Quiet City Hours
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card6.Descript: Architecture, prayer, and calm beyond the rush.
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card7.Title: Amman at Ease
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card7.Descript: A city of soft rhythm and timeless contrast.
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card8.Title: Ma'in in the Rocks
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card8.Descript: Thermal waters flowing through quiet stone.
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card9.Title: Desert by Quad
Jordan.ExperiencesSection.Card9.Descript: Slow movement across open sand and silence.
Jordan.TravelNotesSection.Title: The Rhythm of Jordan
Jordan.TravelNotesSection.Point1: Silence is part of the landscape.
Jordan.TravelNotesSection.Point4: Mornings here carry a particular kind of calm.
Jordan.CTASection.Title: Ready to step into the stillness?
Jordan.CTASection.Subtitle: From Petra at first light to long evenings in Wadi Rum, this is a journey for people who want to feel the place, not just pass through it.
Oman.HeroSection.Title: Oman
Oman.AboutSection.Title: Quiet Beauty, Deeply Felt
Oman.AboutSection.Description: Oman has a rare kind of calm — in its white stone cities, peaceful mosques, open coastlines, mountain roads, and desert horizons. It feels clear, spacious, and quietly extraordinary.
Oman.AboutSection.Quote: Oman does not impress loudly — it stays with quiet certainty.
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Title: Selected Experiences
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card1.Title: Wadi Morning
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card1.Descriptio: Fresh water, stone, and the early quiet.
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card2.Title: Coastal Drift
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card2.Descriptio: Sea air, open roads, and calm horizons.
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card3.Title: Wahiba Sands
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card4.Title: Mountain Air
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card5.Title: Hidden Shoreline
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card5.Descriptio: Secluded beauty at the edge of the sea.
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card6.Title: White City Calm
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card6.Descriptio: Clean lines, mosques, and quiet streets.
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card7.Title: Wahiba by Jeep
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card7.Descriptio: Rolling dunes, open skies, and a quiet sense of scale.
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card8.Title: Wadi Bani Khalid
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card8.Descriptio: Clear water, palm shade, and stillness in the canyon.
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card9.Title: E-Foil Over Water
Oman.ExperiencesSection.Card9.Descriptio: Effortless motion above the sea in near silence.
Oman.TravelNotesSection.Title: The Rhythm of Oman
Oman.TravelNotesSection.Point1: Beauty here is clear, clean, and unforced.
Oman.TravelNotesSection.Point2: The route feels calm from beginning to end.
Oman.TravelNotesSection.Point3: Even the cities move with quiet dignity.
Oman.CTASection.Title: Let Oman slow the world for a while
Oman.CTASection.Subtitle: A slower route through desert space, coastal calm, white stone, and mountain light.
